memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: Scottish - Spelling variations of this family name include: Maule, Maull, Maul and others. First found in Yorkshire where they were seated from very early times and were granted lands by Duke William of Normandy, their liege Lord, for their distinguished assistance at the Battle of Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: Christopher Maul settled in New York in 1709; John George Maul settled in Philadelphia in 1754; Thomas Maul settled in New England in 1617; Casper Maule settled in Philadelphia in 1753. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). Motto Translated: Clemency concealed under rigour.

zh.lifeSummary: Alice Kinge是William King的女兒，於1510年出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德。她於大約1534年與William Barnes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年12月27日在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Kinge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: King
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Kinge was born in 1510, in Nayland, Suffolk, England as the daughter of William King. She married William Barnes about 1534. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 December 1560, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Kinge est née en 1510, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de William King. Elle a épousé William Barnes environ 1534. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1560, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Kingeは1510年にイギリススフォルクナイランドでWilliam Kingの娘として生まれた。約1534年にWilliam Barnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年12月27日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Kinge(은)는 1510년 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 William King의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 William Barnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 12월 27일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Kinge родилась в 1510 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия. Её отца звали William King. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Barnes около 1534 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 декабря 1560 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
